Uses of Package
org.apache.juneau.commons.function

Packages that use org.apache.juneau.commons.function
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.assertions
Assertions API
org.apache.juneau.commons.bean
Bean-modeling layer for Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.commons.collections
Enhanced collection utilities that extend the standard Java Collections Framework with fluent APIs, specialized collection types, and caching capabilities.
org.apache.juneau.commons.function
Functional programming utilities including enhanced function interfaces, consumers, suppliers, tuples, exception-handling variants, and large-dataset streaming APIs.
org.apache.juneau.commons.inject
Lightweight bean lookup, contribution, and injection support for Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.commons.lang
Language utilities including value wrappers, version management, string formatting, state enums, and other common language constructs.
org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect
Comprehensive reflection utilities for working with classes, methods, fields, constructors, and annotations in a more convenient and type-safe way than the standard Java reflection APIs.
org.apache.juneau.commons.settings
Thread-safe system property access with support for global and per-thread overrides, making it useful for unit tests and configuration management.
org.apache.juneau.commons.utils
Common internal utilities.
org.apache.juneau.marshall
Marshalling API
org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser
Parser API
org.apache.juneau.marshall.swap
Swap API
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.arg
REST Method Argument Beans
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.commons.function used by org.apache.juneau.assertions
    Class
    Description
    Snippet
    A functional interface identical to Runnable but allows the Snippet.run() method to throw checked exceptions.
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.commons.function used by org.apache.juneau.commons.bean
    Class
    Description
    BeanFactory
    A universal factory interface used with @Marshalled(factory=X.class) for any bean type the framework needs to instantiate.
    Consumer4
    A functional interface representing an operation that accepts four arguments and returns no result.
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.commons.function used by org.apache.juneau.commons.collections
    Class
    Description
    Function2
    A functional interface representing a function that accepts two arguments and produces a result.
    Function3
    A functional interface representing a function that accepts three arguments and produces a result.
    Function4
    A functional interface representing a function that accepts four arguments and produces a result.
    Function5
    A functional interface representing a function that accepts five arguments and produces a result.
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.commons.function used by org.apache.juneau.commons.function
    Class
    Description
    BeanChannel
    A lifecycle-aware round-trip interface that combines both BeanSupplier (for serialization) and BeanConsumer (for parsing) on the same property or class.
    BeanConsumer
    A lifecycle-aware consumer for use as a parser target, receiving deserialized beans one at a time.
    BeanFactory
    A universal factory interface used with @Marshalled(factory=X.class) for any bean type the framework needs to instantiate.
    BeanSupplier
    A lifecycle-aware producer for use as a serializer source, providing beans lazily one at a time.
    Consumer2
    A functional interface representing an operation that accepts two arguments and returns no result.
    Consumer3
    A functional interface representing an operation that accepts three arguments and returns no result.
    Consumer4
    A functional interface representing an operation that accepts four arguments and returns no result.
    Consumer5
    A functional interface representing an operation that accepts five arguments and returns no result.
    Function2
    A functional interface representing a function that accepts two arguments and produces a result.
    Function3
    A functional interface representing a function that accepts three arguments and produces a result.
    Function4
    A functional interface representing a function that accepts four arguments and produces a result.
    Function5
    A functional interface representing a function that accepts five arguments and produces a result.
    Memoizer
    A thread-safe supplier that caches the result of the first call and supports resetting the cache.
    NullableSupplier
    A Supplier whose value may be null, with Optional-like null-safe query methods.
    ThrowingConsumer
    A functional interface representing an operation that accepts a single argument, returns no result, and may throw a checked exception.
    ThrowingConsumer2
    A functional interface representing an operation that accepts two arguments, returns no result, and may throw a checked exception.
    ThrowingConsumer3
    A functional interface representing an operation that accepts three arguments, returns no result, and may throw a checked exception.
    ThrowingConsumer4
    A functional interface representing an operation that accepts four arguments, returns no result, and may throw a checked exception.
    ThrowingConsumer5
    A functional interface representing an operation that accepts five arguments, returns no result, and may throw a checked exception.
    ThrowingFunction2
    A functional interface representing a function that accepts two arguments, produces a result, and may throw a checked exception.
    ThrowingFunction3
    A functional interface representing a function that accepts three arguments, produces a result, and may throw a checked exception.
    ThrowingFunction4
    A functional interface representing a function that accepts four arguments, produces a result, and may throw a checked exception.
    ThrowingFunction5
    A functional interface representing a function that accepts five arguments, produces a result, and may throw a checked exception.
    Tuple1
    Represents an immutable tuple containing a single value.
    Tuple2
    Represents an immutable tuple containing two values.
    Tuple3
    Represents a simple tuple of 3 objects.
    Tuple4
    Represents a simple tuple of 4 objects.
    Tuple5
    Represents a simple tuple of 5 objects.

    Description
    Memoizer
    A thread-safe supplier that caches the result of the first call and supports resetting the cache.

    Description
    ThrowingConsumer2
    A functional interface representing an operation that accepts two arguments, returns no result, and may throw a checked exception.
    ThrowingFunction
    A functional interface representing a function that accepts one argument, produces a result, and may throw a checked exception.

    A thread-safe supplier that caches the result of the first call and supports resetting the cache.

    Class
    Description
    Memoizer
    A thread-safe supplier that caches the result of the first call and supports resetting the cache.
    NullableSupplier
    A Supplier whose value may be null, with Optional-like null-safe query methods.
    Snippet
    A functional interface identical to Runnable but allows the Snippet.run() method to throw checked exceptions.
    ThrowingSupplier
    A functional interface representing a supplier of results that may throw a checked exception.
